original_884_site_attempt.rejection_reason: 55 all-zero site fixed effects imply quasi-complete separation and nonexistence of a finite unregularized logistic MLE.

Northeast.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

Northern Rockies and Plains.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

Northwest.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

Ohio Valley.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

South.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

Southeast.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

Southwest.certificate: maximum complete margin and maximum nonnegative mean margin are both zero within tolerance

Upper Midwest.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

West.certificate: at least one site indicator has observations from only one outcome class; its coefficient can diverge with nonnegative signed margins and a strict margin on that site's rows

proposed_829_site_attempt.rejection_reason: Northwest retained genuine quasi-complete separation after outcome-varying site restriction.
